plan.action: Audit lib/deploy.sh against all acceptance criteria. Verify: (a) deploy_run_agent passes tests context to the agent, (b) deploy_gate returns 1 on fail so loop_run_iteration stops before merge, (c) deploy_persist writes deploy.json artifact, (d) commit_update_prd is called on pass. Note any gaps.

Add a git commit inside deploy_gate for gate-related artifacts after decision=pass. After calling deploy_persist and commit_update_prd, stage Output/<ticket_id>/deploy.json and Input/prd.json then call git commit with a message like 'chore: [<ticket_id>] deployment gate passed'. This fulfils the acceptance criterion that gate-related changes are linked to git history.

Ensure Agents/deployment.md constraints enforce that gates_checked must include both 'tests' and 'typecheck', and that failures are surfaced when decision=fail. Review the output format section to confirm it matches what deploy_gate validates (decision, gates_checked, failures, notes).

Review tests/deploy.bats for coverage of: (1) gate commit creation on pass, (2) return-to-developer behavior on fail (status=1), (3) ADR consistency validation path, (4) missing-fields error, (5) non-JSON error. Add any missing test cases.
Run shellcheck on lib/deploy.sh and Agents/deployment.md lint (if applicable) to ensure typecheck passes with no errors.
Run the full test suite (bats tests/) and confirm deploy.bats passes and no regressions are introduced in other test files.

testing_recommendations: Test that deploy_gate creates a git commit for deploy.json and prd.json when decision=pass (check git log in a temp workspace)
Test that deploy_gate returns exit code 1 when decision=fail, preventing commit_finalize from running
Test that deploy_gate logs failure reasons from the 'failures' array when decision=fail
Test that deploy_gate reads ADR files from Output/ADR/ and includes their content in the agent prompt
Test that deploy_gate reads tests.json artifact and passes it to deploy_run_agent
Test that deploy_run_agent returns non-zero when the claude stub exits non-zero
Test that deploy_gate returns non-zero and prints appropriate error when JSON is missing required fields (decision, gates_checked)
Test that deploy_persist creates Output/<ticket_id>/deploy.json with valid JSON content
Verify all existing tests in tests/deploy.bats still pass after changes
Run shellcheck on lib/deploy.sh with no errors
risks: Adding a git commit inside deploy_gate couples the deploy module to git state — the workspace must be a valid git repo and on the feature branch at call time. This is already the case in loop_run_iteration but should be confirmed in tests.

The gate commit must not interfere with the subsequent commit_create call in commit_finalize — if deploy_gate stages and commits deploy.json/prd.json, commit_finalize's commit_create will skip them (already committed), which is correct behavior.
shellcheck may flag unquoted variables or pipefail issues introduced by the new git commit call; must pass cleanly.
